metadata.title: Quick Links
metadata.description: Create quick link shortcuts to Wikipedia and other sites

regex.source: .setDesc("Put %s as a placeholder for the text of the link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将 %s 作为链接文本的占位符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If set, spaces in the link text will be replaced by this character (e.g., an underscore).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果设置，链接文本中的空格将被此字符替换（例如，下划线）。")
